## Summary / 概要

- Describe the skill or repository change introduced by this PR.
- 请说明此 PR 新增或修改了什么 skill 或仓库内容。

## Checklist / 检查项

- [ ] I added or updated a skill under `skills/`
- [ ] 我已在 `skills/` 下新增或更新 skill
- [ ] I included `SKILL.md`
- [ ] 我已包含 `SKILL.md`
- [ ] I updated docs if needed
- [ ] 如有需要，我已同步更新文档
- [ ] My change is ready for review
- [ ] 我的改动已可进入审核
